markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance and introduce a new AI tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI Tracking Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch AI with "Check That," a proprietary tool for deeper LLM citation analysis. Outreach gets a 90-day free trial.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Gemini Referrals Surging:** Referrals from Gemini are growing rapidly, validating Outreach's traditional SEO strategy, as Gemini rewards strong organic rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**GA4 Data Discrepancies:** A dip in recent analytics may be a reporting error. Outreach is using Google Search Console (GSC) for QBRs due to known data issues with GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Upcoming Webflow Migration:** Outreach's site migration will pause content publishing. Hadassah will share the timeline once available.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

## Topics

### Analytics & Performance

  - [**Recent Dip:** A dip in performance last week may be a reporting error, not a true decline, due to known data issues with GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Data Source:** Outreach is using GSC for QBRs because GA4 data is unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Referrals from Gemini are growing rapidly, validating the team's traditional SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Content Audit:** A recent audit analyzed 858 URLs to identify pipeline drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Introducing "Check That"

  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch AI with "Check That," a proprietary tool for deeper LLM citation analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Purpose:** A database of prompts tracking which content gets cited by LLMs (e.g., Gemini, ChatGPT) to enable more effective content gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Access:** Outreach gets a 90-day free trial, with an optional paid subscription afterward.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [**Webflow Migration:** Outreach is migrating its site to Webflow, which will pause content publishing. Hadassah will share the timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**New CMO Playbook:** PMMs are developing a new CMO playbook. Hadassah will share the bill of materials with GrowthX once available.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Set up Outreach's "Check That" profile and grant access by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Investigate the GA4 data discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Review the content audit spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Share the Webflow migration timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Share the new CMO playbook materials with Andi and Jen.](https://fathom.video/share/z_kJHMcJy82LQnyfCoJi5ngjH2wULeyx?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
